name: Use of Non-Canonical URL Paths for Authorization Decisions
description: The product makes authorization decisions based on URL paths without first converting them to canonical form. Attackers can bypass access controls by using equivalent but non-canonical URLs such as IP addresses instead of hostnames, URL-encoded characters, mixed case, double slashes, or trailing dots.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a URL path that flows directly to an AUTH node making authorization decisions without first passing through a TRANSFORM node that canonicalizes the path. Look for URL-based access control that does not normalize paths before comparison against access rules.
